name: Growth Hormone Administration
summary: Growth-promoting endocrine intervention with older-adult randomized evidence showing body-composition changes but frequent adverse effects, making it a safety boundary rather than a geroprotective signal.
mechanism_summary: Raises growth hormone and downstream IGF-1/anabolic signaling; older-adult evidence highlights lean-mass and fat-mass changes but also edema, arthralgia, carpal-tunnel symptoms, and glucose-intolerance risks.

open_questions: Whether any GH/IGF-increasing strategy can improve aging-relevant function without unacceptable endocrine harms
How to balance tissue repair and anabolic effects against cancer, diabetes, and growth-signaling concerns
